name: Men's Nano Puff Jacket
description: The legendary Nano Puff Jacket is a weather-resistant, lightweight and packable synthetic insulation layer built for climbers who need warmth even when wet. With 60-g PrimaLoft Gold Insulation Eco made from 100% postconsumer recycled polyester and P.U.R.E. technology, this is the jacket so many call the magic jacket. Made in a Fair Trade Certified factory.
highlights: 4.6 stars from 2,018 reviews. Windproof, water-resistant, and stays warm when wet.

name: Women's Nano Puff Jacket
description: The Women's Nano Puff Jacket delivers warm, windproof, water-resistant performance with lightweight, compressible insulation for packability. Built with 60-g PrimaLoft Gold Insulation Eco using P.U.R.E. technology for reduced emissions, this versatile midlayer is an uncontested favourite for any outdoor pursuit. Made in a Fair Trade Certified factory.
highlights: 4.6 stars from 1,967 reviews. The go-to midlayer for women who hike, climb, and travel.

name: Men's Torrentshell 3L Rain Jacket
description: Simple and unpretentious, the Torrentshell 3L Rain Jacket meets Patagonia's H2No Performance Standard for exceptional waterproof and breathable protection. This trusted 3-layer shell provides all-day comfort and long-lasting durability, with fabric, membrane and DWR finish made without intentionally added PFAS. Made in a Fair Trade Certified factory.
highlights: 4.6 stars from 896 reviews. Trusted wet-weather protection without PFAS chemicals.

name: Men's Houdini Wind Jacket
description: The featherlight Houdini Wind Jacket weighs just 105g and stuffs into its own chest pocket, making it the ultimate emergency wind and light rain layer for trail runners, cyclists and fast-moving alpinists. Made from 100% recycled ripstop nylon with a DWR finish, it disappears into your pack until the wind picks up.
highlights: 970+ reviews. The original ultralight wind shell that started it all.

name: Men's Nano Puff Hoody
description: The Nano Puff Hoody adds a hood to Patagonia's best-selling synthetic insulation jacket for extra warmth and protection during alpine pursuits. With the same 60-g PrimaLoft Gold Insulation Eco and 100% recycled shell, plus an insulated, helmet-compatible hood that seals out wind and weather at exposed belays.
highlights: A hooded version of the best-selling Nano Puff for maximum alpine versatility.

name: Men's Nano Puff Vest
description: The Nano Puff Vest delivers core warmth without restricting arm movement, making it ideal for active pursuits like climbing, cycling and running in cool conditions. Built with 60-g PrimaLoft Gold Insulation Eco and a windproof, water-resistant recycled polyester shell.
highlights: Core warmth with full arm freedom for active pursuits.

name: Men's Better Sweater Fleece Jacket
description: The Better Sweater Fleece Jacket combines the aesthetic of a wool sweater with the performance of polyester fleece, made entirely from 100% recycled material. Its knit face and soft interior make it equally at home on a mountain trail or in a coffee shop, delivering everyday versatility with zero virgin plastic.
highlights: Patagonia's most versatile fleece: looks like a sweater, performs like technical fleece.

name: Men's R1 Air Crew
description: The R1 Air Crew is Patagonia's most breathable midlayer, engineered for high-output activities where overheating is the enemy. Its open-knit Regulator fleece construction maximises airflow while trapping just enough warmth for moving fast in cool conditions. Made from recycled polyester.
highlights: Maximum breathability for high-output alpine activities.

name: Black Hole Duffel 55L
description: The Black Hole Duffel 55L is a bomber travel bag built from 100% recycled polyester ripstop with a TPU-film laminate that shrugs off moisture and abuse. Convertible backpack straps, a U-shaped lid for easy access, and a lifetime guarantee make this the go-anywhere adventure duffel.
highlights: The original adventure duffel, now made entirely from recycled materials.

name: Men's Down Sweater Jacket
description: The Down Sweater Jacket wraps you in 800-fill-power Advanced Global Traceable Down insulation for exceptional warmth at minimal weight. The 100% recycled polyester shell resists wind and moisture while the quilted construction prevents down shifting. Packs into its own internal chest pocket for travel.
highlights: Premium 800-fill traceable down for maximum warmth-to-weight ratio.
